title: Microsoft negotiates the closure or sale of several Xbox studios, including Double Fine and Ninja Theory
summary: Amid an internal restructuring, several Xbox studios seek to avoid closure while top executives leave their positions.

title: Nintendo Switch updates its eShop and fixes a nearly decade-long annoying bug
summary: System update 22.5.0 finally speeds up the Nintendo Switch online store and also arrives on Switch 2.

title: Hellraiser: Revival announces its October release date with a bloody trailer
summary: The new horror game based on Clive Barker's work will arrive in October and is receiving good reviews for its Doom-style action.

title: Don't Nod, creators of Life is Strange, runs out of funds and faces an uncertain future
summary: The company has informed its investors that it needs urgent funding to reach 2027 and avoid bankruptcy.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its definitive update with the 'true ending' and a Black Flag mission
summary: 453 days after its launch, the RPG finally adds its canonical conclusion and the promotional Black Flag skin.

title: Xbox Game Pass announces late June games, including EA Sports FC 26 and other departures
summary: The subscription service adds highly anticipated new titles and confirms the imminent removal of eight games from the catalog.

title: Steam Next Fest gives away thousands of playable demos, many with generative AI disclosures
summary: Valve's event offers 4,347 demos, of which more than a thousand include a disclosure about the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Overwatch 2 debuts season 3 with Shion, a new hero on a motorcycle, and the Tokyo map
summary: The new season introduces the dangerous DPS Shion, balance changes, and a glimpse of season 4 with a Korean theme.

title: Outward 2 delays its launch until 2027 just one month before its planned release
summary: The open-world survival RPG suffers an unexpected delay to polish its ambitious proposal.

title: Take-Two confirms the release date of GTA 6 and explains the reasons for its lengthy development
summary: The CEO of Rockstar Games' parent company reaffirms the release window and attributes the delay to the pursuit of perfection.

title: Shrek 5 releases its first official trailer and confirms its 2027 release with detailed design
summary: The new trailer shows Shrek and Donkey with impressive visual quality and continues the war of taunts with Disney.

title: Mark Hamill joins the cast of the third season of the Twisted Metal series
summary: The Star Wars star will play a character familiar to fans of the saga in the successful Peacock adaptation.

title: Sony patents an innovative controller with buttons that stiffen to offer dynamic resistance
summary: The company's new patent describes a haptic feedback system that changes the hardness of the buttons in real time.

title: A group of hackers steals Nintendo employee data and demands a $2 million ransom
summary: Nintendo confirms it is aware of the security incident that compromises sensitive information of its staff through an external provider.

title: Ex-Naughty Dog artist defends the silence surrounding the new sci-fi game Intergalactic
summary: A former developer of the studio explains why the anticipated title was not shown during Summer Game Fest.

title: The United Kingdom will ban social media for minors under 16, and the impact on video games is uncertain
summary: The new British legislation seeks to protect children online, but raises doubts about its application on gaming and streaming platforms.

title: Mark Gordon, top executive at Treyarch, retires after 22 years at the Call of Duty studio
summary: The veteran executive leaves the franchise development to focus on his next personal and professional chapter.

title: World of Warcraft fans speculate about a major re-release or remix of WoW Classic
summary: The mysterious internal project 'Camelot' and other clues fuel rumors of a new version of Blizzard's classic MMO.

title: Sega creates a life-sized Sonic figure with its DNA inside a Chaos Emerald
summary: Sega's controversial and strange promotion has caused all kinds of reactions and memes on social media.

title: Arc Raiders strengthens its fight against cheating and adds new missions and events
summary: Embark Studios' extraction game implements a harsh punishment for cheaters and expands its content with projects and relics.
